description: Sprawlmap — Franklin County public land and resource finder. Tool schema for LLM agents.

function.name: findPublicParcels
function.description: Find public/city-owned parcels near a location. Returns parcels owned by City of Columbus, Franklin County Land Bank, Metro Parks, Board of Education, or other public entities with risk assessment.

function.name: findNearbyResources
function.description: Find nearby amenities via OpenStreetMap: bus stops, laundromats, drinking water, charging, food banks, mental health, restrooms, shelters, dog parks, wifi, hospitals, pharmacies.

function.name: scoreLocation
function.description: Score a location 0-100 for suitability against user needs. 40pts for public land availability + 60pts for needs met.

function.name: getParcelDetail
function.description: Get full parcel detail by PIN from Franklin County Auditor.

function.name: geocode
function.description: Convert address or place name to lat/lon. Biases to Columbus OH automatically.

risk_levels.low: LUC 640 or 605 — city-owned or land bank. CPD trespass auth required, rarely filed proactively.
risk_levels.med: LUC 600-699 other — other exempt public entities.
